risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Support 'Disk cleanup in Windows' belgesinden alinmistir. Geri alinabilir adimlar - yalnizca gecici dosyalar ve cache temizlenir. Win11'de Storage Sense modern alternatifidir.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Support 'Disk cleanup in Windows'. Reversible - only temporary files and caches are cleared. On Win11, Storage Sense is the modern alternative.

body.tr: 1) Gorev cubugu arama kutusuna 'disk cleanup' yaz. 2) Sonuclardan 'Disk Cleanup' sec. 3) Temizlenecek diski (genelde C:) sec, OK. 4) Silinecek dosya turlerinin yanindaki kutulari isaretle, OK. Varsayilan secili: Downloaded Program Files, Temporary Internet Files, Thumbnails.
body.en: 1) In Taskbar search, type 'disk cleanup'. 2) Pick 'Disk Cleanup' from results. 3) Select drive to clean (usually C:), OK. 4) Check the boxes next to file types to delete, OK. Defaults selected: Downloaded Program Files, Temporary Internet Files, Thumbnails.

title.en: Open Disk Cleanup from command line

body.tr: Disk Cleanup penceresinde 'Clean up system files' dugmesine bas. Yonetici yetkisi ister. Eklenen kategoriler: Windows Update Cleanup, eski Windows surumu (yukseltme yapildiysa 10 gun icinde), DirectX Shader Cache, Delivery Optimization Files.
body.en: In Disk Cleanup window press 'Clean up system files'. Requires admin. Adds: Windows Update Cleanup, previous Windows installation (within 10 days of upgrade), DirectX Shader Cache, Delivery Optimization Files.

title.tr: Win11 modern alternatifi: Settings > System > Storage > Storage Sense
title.en: Win11 modern alternative: Settings > System > Storage > Storage Sense

body.tr: Settings > System > Storage > Storage Sense: otomatik gecici dosya silme, Recycle Bin 30+ gunden eski oge silme, Downloads klasoru 60+ gunden eski dosya silme. 'Cleanup recommendations' (Settings > System > Storage > Cleanup recommendations) buyuk + nadir kullanilan uygulamalari onerir.
body.en: Settings > System > Storage > Storage Sense: auto-delete temp files, Recycle Bin items older than 30+ days, Downloads folder files older than 60+ days. 'Cleanup recommendations' (Settings > System > Storage > Cleanup recommendations) suggests large/rarely-used apps.
